place: Maenam, Ko Samui District, Surat Thani, Thailand
title: Three-Bedroom Garden Pool Villa in Maenam
blurb: A serene three-bedroom pool villa in a tranquil Maenam residence on Koh Samui's quiet northern coast — single-storey living around a private pool and lush garden, with three en-suite bedrooms, an open kitchen and a covered lounge sala. ฿11,600,000.
detail:
Set in a peaceful residential pocket of Maenam on Koh Samui's calm northern coast, this single-storey villa is a private garden retreat wrapped around its own pool. It sits on 508 m² of land with 326 m² of built space, a short drive from Maenam's beach, walking street and the Bophut and Fisherman's Village dining scene.

The open living level runs from a kitchen with a central island through bright living and dining areas that open to the pool terrace. Three double bedrooms each have an en-suite bathroom and their own garden or pool outlook, with air-conditioning throughout and the villa delivered fully furnished.

Outside, the pool is framed by lawn, mature planting and a covered lounge sala for shaded afternoons. The villa is offered with a fresh 30-year registered leasehold granted at purchase. Lease terms, floor plan and inventory on request.
